rounds.plan_think: Based on the summary provided, the case seems to involve the '行政主体-劳动和社会保障行政管理（劳动，社会保障）' category since it involves the Hubei Provincial Human Resources and Social Security Department. I will inspect the first chunk to confirm this and look for any other relevant categories.

info.summary: In case (2024)鄂0106行初28号, plaintiff Wei sues the Hubei Provincial Human Resources and Social Security Department for failing to perform its statutory duties. The Wuhan City Wuchang District People's Court requests a designated jurisdiction due to an increase in administrative cases and insufficient judicial resources. The court decides to transfer the case to the Wuhan Railway Transport Court based on Article 24, Paragraph 2 of the Administrative Litigation Law.
info.text:
（2024）鄂0106行初28号原告魏某诉被告湖北省人力资源和社会保障厅不履行法定职责一案，湖北省武汉市武昌区人民法院以本案需要指定管辖为由，报请本院决定。

本院认为，湖北省武汉市武昌区人民法院目前受理的行政案件数量大幅增加，审判力量相对不足，为充分利用全省法院行政审判资源，积极探索行政案件异地审理，本案可以指定管辖。依照《中华人民共和国行政诉讼法》第二十四条第二款规定，裁定如下：

本案由武汉铁路运输法院管辖。

rounds.extract_think: 该段落提到原告魏某起诉湖北省人力资源和社会保障厅未履行其法定职责。因此，这个判决文书属于'行政主体-劳动和社会保障行政管理（劳动，社会保障）'类别。
